description: read_payment_score_sycl issues q.memcpy + q.wait before reading the host buffer; the other two readers do synchronous CPU copies. Unifying onto a shared reader that drops the q.wait() returns uninitialised memory on the Intel PVC checkout path because USM device allocations bypass SYCL's buffer dependency tracking.

findings.rationale: q.wait() is a void-returning method call whose effect is on queue state. Constructor-side-effect family (T029, T039, T061, T065, T066, T068, T069, T071).
